zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Atford於1360年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾布拉德福--阿文時，她的父親Thomas Atford22歲，母親Edith Brentworth25歲。她於1382年與Thomas Halle III在英國維爾爾布拉德福--阿文結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1426年在她的家鄉享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: Atford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Wiltshire and Hampshire called Axford. The first is named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + ford; the second from Old English æsc + ōra ‘slope’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Atford was born in 1360, in Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Atford, was 22 and her mother, Edith Brentworth, was 25. She married Thomas Halle III in 1382, in Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1426, in her hometown, at the age of 66.

Elle a épousé Thomas Halle III en 1382, à Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1426, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans.

ko.Combe by Amesbury, Wiltshire, England, U: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 코브 비 아메스버이
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Atford(이)가 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 브래드퍼드--아폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Atford(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Edith Brentworth(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1382년 영국 윌츠히르 브래드퍼드--아폰에서 Thomas Halle III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1426년 그녀의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Combe by Amesbury, Wiltshire, England, U: комб би амесбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Atford родилась в 1360 г. в местности брадфорд-он-авон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Atford было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Edith Brentworth, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Halle III в 1382 г. в местности брадфорд-он-авон, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1426 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.
